zh.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefield於大約1628年出生在英國。她於大約1650年與John Littlefield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1701年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年74歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克費利浦德瑟特 本 曼恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefield于大约1628年出生在英国。她于大约1650年与John Littlefield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1701年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年74岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克費利浦德瑟特 本 曼恩。

nameMeanings.name: Wakefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Wakefield in Yorkshire and from Wakefield Lawn in Potterspury (Northamptonshire). Both are named from the Old English personal name Waca or Old English wacu ‘wake, festival’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Patience
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting one of the Seven Christian Virtues. The vocabulary word is derived from Latin pati ‘to suffer’, and was associated by the early Christians with those who endured persecution and misfortune without complaint or loss of faith. It was a favourite with the Puritans, but fell out of regular use in the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1642:  Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1653: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

Historical Boundaries: 1700: Massachusetts, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1760: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefield was born about 1628, in England. She married John Littlefield about 1650, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1701, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 74, and was buried in Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefield è nata il circa 1628 nel England. Lei sposato John Littlefield circa 1650, nel York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1701, nel Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefieldは約1628年にイギリスで生まれた。約1650年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークでJohn Littlefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1701年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズで74歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークフレエプオルトデセルト オフ メインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefield(은)는 대략 1628년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1650년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 John Littlefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1701년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 프리프르트 데세르트 프 맹에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefield nasceu aproximadamente 1628, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Littlefield aproximadamente 1650, em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1701, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefield родилась около 1628 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Littlefield около 1650 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1701 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности десирт оф меин, фрипорт, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Patience Wakefield nació aproximadamente 1628, en Inglaterra. Se casó con John Littlefield aproximadamente 1650, en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1701, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
